subcodes.first_line: O thou erudite one of the divine school! Thou hadst written concerning the school, that is, the house of learning for children [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان الهی در خصوص مکتب یعنی دارالتعلیم بجهت اطفال مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @educational curricula, @education of children; moral education, @non-participation in politics, @review of publications
